query:
SELECT s.swap_id, s.state, s.entered_at, p.peer_id
            FROM (
                SELECT max(id) as id, swap_id, state, entered_at
                FROM swap_states
                GROUP BY swap_id
            ) s
            INNER JOIN peers p ON s.swap_id = p.swap_id
            ORDER BY s.id
            LIMIT ?
            OFFSET ?
